description_long: This is a matte black aluminum can with a pull tab opening at the top, from which a vibrant purple liquid is energetically splashing out. The can features a stylized label with the words 'ENERGY' and 'FROSTBLAST' in bold, icy blue and white lettering, accompanied by dynamic graphic elements that evoke a sense of motion and refreshment. The splash effect is highly stylized, with exaggerated droplets and arcs, suggesting a burst of flavor or energy. The can's surface is smooth and slightly reflective, with additional small text and barcode details visible on the back. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, likely intended to appeal to a youthful, urban audience. The can appears to be a single-serving beverage container, typical for energy drinks or juices found in urban environments.
description: A matte black can with a bold 'FROSTBLAST' label and a dramatic purple liquid splash emerging from the pull tab opening. The design is modern, energetic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the can's pull tab and the main 'FROSTBLAST' label, with purple liquid splashing upward.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the 'ENERGY' and 'FROSTBLAST' text, with the splash effect more pronounced to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the splash visible but no label details, showing the plain black surface of the can.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a barcode and small text, with the splash effect visible from the side.
